name: Scallop & Bell Pepper Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Red Bell Pepper, cored and cut into ¼-inch strips
1 Green Bell Pepper, cored and cut into ¼-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, seed, and cut the bell peppers into ¼-inch strips.
2. Separate endive leaves and rinse them. Pat dry and arrange in a star pattern on serving plates.
3. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the bell pepper strips and cumin. Cook, stirring frequently, until the peppers are wilted, about 3 minutes.
4. Add the scallops and coriander to the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the scallops are opaque, about 4 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, whisk together the remaining 2 tbsp oil, lime juice, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, and salt in a small bowl until blended.
6. Remove the skillet from heat. Pour the dressing over the scallop mixture.
7. Spoon the scallop mixture onto endive leaves and drizzle with pan liquid.
